text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahahahaha! No way! You're<n>messing with
me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot Nishino Flower looking like she<n>wants to
speak to Tosen Jordan.<n>Unfortunately, the latter is
deep in<n>conversation with a friend.

text_block_list.name: Trendy Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Am not! Get this, Nakayama and Prez<n>threw
cheesy puns at each other for<n>ten whole minutes!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For real?! Wish I could've been<n>there! Wait—tell
me you recorded it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmm? ...Aww, sorry, I gotta dash.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, was Flower here just now?
choice_data_list: Yeah. It looked like she was waiting for you.
Yeah. It looked like she was waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, sounds like I screwed up...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I notice a key chain lying at<n>my feet.
There's a small plushie<n>hanging from it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's gotta be Flower's.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Dunno where I'd find her, so I<n>guess I'll
give it to Bourbon. They're<n>roomies and all.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Bourbon. We picked up something<n>of
Flower's. Mind passing it along?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Acknowledged. I shall retain it for<n>safekeeping.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, I didn't take you for a fan of<n>those sorts
of mags.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is only for investigative purposes. I<n>purchased
several after seeing<n>Flower brooding over them
each<n>night.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah? Something's got her bothered?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Which ones was she reading?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My own interest piqued, I flip through<n>a few
magazines. Which of these<n>articles has Nishino
Flower most<n>likely read?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
DIY... Commencing relevant keyword<n>search.
Article match found: "How to<n>Build a Resin Table!"

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? Since when is she building a<n>table?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analyzing her recent behavior, we<n>may
extrapolate that she wants a<n>table to place by the
flower bed. She<n>must be deliberating over its
construction.
choice_data_list: Maybe she dropped by to ask you for advice.
Maybe she dropped by to ask you for advice.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah... doubt that. Does my look<n>scream "DIY"
to you?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But Flower was muttering about<n>lacquer, polish,
and UV light while<n>reading. This is the only DIY
article<n>that matches all terms.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's likely that she was studying the<n>process of
coloring the wood with<n>lacquer before hardening it
with UV<n>light and applying polish.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh... You sure she wasn't reading<n>about nails?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Nails. Cross-checking database for<n>related
keywords...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Stop, stop, stop! You don't gotta<n>bother—it's
obviously nail-related! I<n>mean, tables? Like, what?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Totally! I bet she wanted to ask me<n>about her
wardrobe earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Inconsistency discovered. I heard<n>Flower mutter
several terms while<n>reading magazines, but none
are in<n>this article.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Expanding the definitions leads to a<n>weak match
with a shoe care article,<n>but that seems unlikely.
Are you<n>certain she is concerned about her<n>attire?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What kinda stuff was she saying?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have records of her saying the<n>words "lacquer,"
"polish," and "UV<n>light."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's gotta be about nails.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Nails. Cross-checking database for<n>related
keywords...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Stop, stop, stop! You don't gotta<n>bother—it's
obviously nail-related!<n>Like, when did shoes even
come into<n>this?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So the terms "lacquer," "polish," and<n>"UV light" also
fall under the category<n>of nails? It seems I must
update my<n>database.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing the sweets competition<n>got her
interested. Think she wanted<n>my help or
something?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Meh, whatevs. Bourbon, gimme your<n>hand. I'll do
your nails.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: For what reason is that necessary?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, y'know, since Flower seems<n>interested.
Don'tcha think it'd be a<n>good convo starter?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're her roomie and all, so it'd be<n>easy for her
to bring it up with you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reasoning acknowledged. I will gladly<n>comply with
your order.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm short on time, so I'll only paint<n>your index
finger. But I'll make it<n>crazy cute!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Kay, we're done! It's all you now,<n>Bourbon! Kill it!
